title: Guinness World Records Recognition
description: Recognized for outstanding contributions to cybersecurity education and technology awareness at a young age. Noted internationally for work in ethical hacking education and digital security awareness.

title: Golden Book of World Records
description: Honored by the Golden Book of World Records for achievements in cybersecurity education and for being recognized as one of the youngest ethical hacking educators promoting responsible digital security practices.

title: National Science Championship – All India Rank 7
description: Secured All India Rank 7 in the National Science Championship, demonstrating strong academic excellence and deep interest in scientific research, technology, and innovation.

title: Vidyarthi Vigyan Manthan (VVM) – State Rank 4
description: Achieved State Rank 4 in the Vidyarthi Vigyan Manthan (VVM) 2025 examination, a national science talent search that promotes scientific curiosity, innovation, and research among students.

title: Excellence in Cybersecurity Awareness
description: Recognized for promoting cybersecurity awareness, ethical hacking education, and safe digital practices among students and young technology learners.
